title: aster fallax var. brachyglossus
intro: Aster fallax var. brachyglossus, also known as a variant of the Aster fallax plant, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Aster fallax var. brachyglossus is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be found in tincture or dried flower form for herbal remedies.
